# family-address negative corpus — should NOT trigger
# Addresses without family/home context, or shipping/business addresses
Ship to 123 Main Street
Deliver to 456 Oak Avenue
Send package to 789 Elm Street
Office at 234 Maple Drive
Business address: 567 Pine Road
Billing address: 890 Cedar Lane
Return address: 123 Birch Court
Warehouse: 456 Willow Way
Corporate headquarters: 789 Spruce Avenue
Store location: 234 Poplar Street
Distribution center: 567 Chestnut Road
Factory: 890 Walnut Drive
Mail stop: 123 Hickory Lane
P.O. Box 456 Ash Street post office
Registered office: 789 Magnolia Court
Invoice address: 234 Sycamore Place
Sender: 567 Mulberry Lane suite 200
Company premises: 890 Dogwood Drive floor 4
Registered address: 123 Redbud Court LLC
Billing dept: 456 Sweetgum Avenue
